title: astragalus cornutus
intro: Astragalus cornutus, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Asia. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, immunomodulatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus cornutus include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, flu, and other infections. Astragalus cornutus can be prepared in various forms, including dried roots, capsules, and tea, which are often used in traditional medicine to enhance overall well-being and promote longevity.
